themes.themeName: Order Book Latency during Market Close
themes.themeDescription: Intraday stock traders are complaining about latency when verifying order execution status in the order book, leading to double order submission due to uncertainty.
representativeQuotes: Order showed pending for 3 minutes. I clicked buy again, and now I have double the shares because both executed!
Delayed notifications for executed orders. The order book is not updating in real time between 3:00 PM and 3:30 PM.
actionIdeas: Introduce debouncing client-side on the transaction buttons to block accidental dual submissions.
Implement optimistic UI updates for stock order state transitions if database roundtrips lag.

themes.themeDescription: A subset of users with accessibility preferences noted readability issues with specific UI charts and fonts under Dark Mode, particularly the grey text over black backgrounds.
representativeQuotes: Dark mode is great but font contrast is very low. Hard to read stock returns numbers.
The grey colored lines in the profit/loss section are barely visible on the dark background.
actionIdeas: Audit color contrast ratios in dark mode against WCAG AA requirements.
Brighten text color classes for subtext labels when dark mode is enabled.
